# setStereoPanValue(_:)

**Instance Method**

Set the stereoPanValue property.

## Declaration

```swift
func setStereoPanValue(_ value: Float) throws
```

## Parameters

- **value**: A Float where 0.0 is full left, 1.0 is full right, and 0.5 is center.
title: setStereoPanValue(_:)
